summary:
Comprehensive forensic audit report for Los Romeros Limited (Company No. 06993349) covering three areas:
1. PSC Verification — confirms Philip Anthony Harrison and Beryl Harrison ARE formally registered as PSCs on the Companies House register (both notified 23 December 2019 via PSC01), resolving the concern about missing filings
2. DLA Forensic Audit — analyses the Director's Loan Account from the 2025 XBRL accounts, confirming £25,069 is owed TO the directors (not by them), growing at ~£5,696/year from annual management fees, with a critical discrepancy between the £159,634 book value and ~£269,000 actual sale proceeds
3. Corporate Status Update — confirms Beryl Harrison resigned as director on 10 February 2026 (TM01 filed), leaving Philip as sole director for all MVL purposes
